prompt: Create a premium, elegant circular badge/emblem design for Immunotec brand. The badge must be on a completely clean white background with no other elements. The design is a circular seal/stamp style emblem. At the center, the Immunotec antibody Y-shaped icon (two arms angling upward from a central stem, like the letter Y with serifs at the tips — this is their official logo mark) rendered in deep navy blue (#1A1F2E). Below the icon, the word 'IMMUNOTEC' in clean, elegant sans-serif uppercase letters, navy blue (#1A1F2E), with generous letter-spacing. A thin sage green (#6B8868) horizontal line separates the logo from the tagline below. Below the line: 'CIENCIA & BIENESTAR' in small uppercase sage green text. The badge has a double-ring circular border: outer ring in navy blue (#1A1F2E), inner ring thinner. Between the rings at the top, curved text reading 'CONSULTORA OFICIAL' in sage green (#6B8868) uppercase. Between the rings at the bottom, curved text reading 'DESDE 1996' in warm brown (#7A5C44). Two small sage green dots sit at the 3 o'clock and 9 o'clock positions between the rings. The overall feel is minimalist, premium, and institutional — like a luxury certification seal. Colors restricted to: navy (#1A1F2E), sage (#6B8868), warm brown (#7A5C44), and white (#FAFAF8). No gradients. No shadows. No 3D effects. Clean vector-like flat design. Do not add any texture or background pattern. The badge should look like it belongs on a high-end personal brand website.
negative_prompt: gradients, textures, noise, photography, 3D renders, shadows, glossy effects, metallic effects, complex backgrounds, watermarks, blurry text, decorative flourishes, ornate borders, gold color, red color, realistic materials, embossing, depth effects, bevels, drop shadows, glow effects, lens flare, soft focus, multiple objects, cluttered composition
